twitter_thread: Inflation can erode 42% of a $100k portfolio in 5 years. 85% of passive strategies don't account for this.
A 20/80 barbell approach can help: 20% in high-risk assets like REITs, 80% in low-risk TIPS and bonds.
TIPS and Series I Savings Bonds have returned 2.5% and 4.3% respectively, beating inflation.
REITs like Vanguard's VGSIX have returned 8.2% annually, but come with higher volatility.
Over-allocating to dividend stocks can backfire: 70% of dividend stocks cut payouts during the 2020 crash.
Rebalancing quarterly can reduce risk by 15%: set a calendar reminder to review your portfolio.
How do you protect your passive income from inflation? #passiveincome #inflation
pack.linkedin: A $100k portfolio can lose 42% to inflation in 5 years, yet 85% of passive income strategies fail to account for this. A 20/80 barbell approach can mitigate this risk, allocating 20% to high-risk assets like REITs and 80% to low-risk TIPS and bonds. For example, TIPS and Series I Savings Bonds have returned 2.5% and 4.3% respectively, beating inflation. Meanwhile, REITs like Vanguard's VGSIX have returned 8.2% annually, but come with higher volatility. To avoid common pitfalls, avoid over-allocating to dividend stocks and rebalance your portfolio quarterly. What strategies have you found effective in protecting your passive income from inflation?
tiktok_hooks: Inflation is silently stealing 42% of your portfolio: fight back with this strategy
Don't let inflation cut your returns in half: use this simple 20/80 approach
Protect your passive income from inflation with this one simple trick
pack.reddit_headline: Passive Income Strategies are Losing 42% to Inflation: What's the Most Effective Way to Protect Your Portfolio?
